+    # Give Point higher priority than the default `Expr` so that

index c936a69..f3548c9 100644
--- a/sympy/printing/repr.py
+++ b/sympy/printing/repr.py
@@ -253,6 +253,22 @@ def _print_tuple(self, expr):
     def _print_WildFunction(self, expr):
         return "%s('%s')" % (expr.__class__.__name__, expr.name)
 
+    def _print_set(self, expr):
+        if not expr:
+            return "set()"
+        return "{%s}" % self.reprify(expr, ", ")
+
+    def _print_frozenset(self, expr):
+        if not expr:
+            return "frozenset()"
+        return "frozenset({%s})" % self.reprify(expr, ", ")
+
+    def _print_dict(self, expr):
+        sep = ", "
+        dict_kvs = ["%s: %s" % (self._print(key), self._print(value))
+                    for key, value in expr.items()]
+        return "{%s}" % sep.join(dict_kvs)
+
     def _print_AlgebraicNumber(self, expr):
         return "%s(%s, %s)" % (expr.__class__.__name__,
             self._print(expr.root), self._print(expr.coeffs()))
